name: Local Coin Company
description_short: Local Coin Company buys and sells precious metals, jewelry, and collectibles for immediate cash in Tualatin, OR. Specializes in gold, silver, platinum, and coin collections with competitive pricing.
description_long:
Local Coin Company is a precious metals and jewelry buyer located in Tualatin, Oregon, operating since at least the time of this profile. The business focuses on purchasing and reselling gold, silver, platinum, palladium, jewelry, and collectible coins. Their team reports extensive experience in buying, selling, and shipping these commodities nationwide, bringing that expertise to local retail operations.

The company offers immediate cash payments for a wide range of items including scrap gold and silver, estate jewelry, diamonds, coin collections, sterling silverware, dental gold, and bullion products. They maintain live spot price displays for gold, silver, platinum, and palladium on their website and update pricing frequently. They also sell investment-grade bullion products including American Gold and Silver Eagles, Canadian Maple Leafs, Krugerrands, and other U.S. coinage to new and experienced investors.

Local Coin Company distinguishes itself through a stated commitment to competitive pricing with a promise to match or beat advertised prices. They encourage advance appointment scheduling for priority service and emphasize personalized customer treatment. Their website includes Spanish language support and highlights their knowledgeable team available to assist with purchases and appraisals.

As a precious metals and jewelry buyer, this business operates within the pawn shop and collateral lending category, though it functions primarily as a direct purchase operation rather than a traditional pawn broker. Customers should understand that prices offered for items are market-based and will fluctuate with commodity prices. The business operates limited hours (Monday-Friday 8 AM-4 PM, Saturday 8 AM-3 PM) and is closed Sundays, which may inconvenience some customers.
address: 19354 SW Boones Ferry Rd, Tualatin, OR 97062

company_info.headquarters: 19354 SW Boones Ferry Rd, Tualatin, OR 97062

pros: Offers immediate cash payments on the spot for precious metals and jewelry
Maintains and displays live spot prices for gold, silver, platinum, and palladium updated frequently
Explicitly commits to matching or beating advertised competitor prices
Accepts wide variety of items: scrap gold, jewelry, coins, sterling, dental gold, diamonds, and estate jewelry
Provides appointment scheduling with priority service for organized transactions
Offers bilingual service with Spanish language support
Sells investment-grade bullion to new investors with expert assistance available
cons: Limited operating hours (closed Sundays, weekday hours end at 4 PM) make weekend/evening access difficult
No online valuation or instant quote system—requires in-person visit for appraisals
Single physical location in Tualatin, OR limits accessibility for customers outside the Portland metro area
Website provides no transparency on how buy prices are calculated relative to spot prices or what markup percentages apply
No information about credentials, certifications, or industry affiliations (e.g., BBB, industry standards) visible on website
best_for: People with gold, silver, or jewelry they need to convert to cash quickly in the Portland area
Coin and bullion collectors looking to buy or sell investment-grade precious metals locally
Estate sale executors seeking to liquidate jewelry and precious metals from inherited collections
Individuals selling scrap gold, dental gold, or sterling silverware for cash without shipping hassle
diagnosis: Best for Oregon residents near Tualatin who have precious metals, jewelry, or coins to sell immediately for cash, or collectors seeking to purchase investment-grade bullion locally. Primary caveat: pricing is market-dependent and customers have no way to compare the company's buy offers against other buyers without visiting in person, and the business has limited hours and a single location.
services: Diamond and gemstone evaluation and purchase
Bullion sales (Eagles, Maples, Krugerrands, bars, rounds)
